economic_notes: Nation has investments in Woodland Cree Industries Ltd., Woodland Cree Energy Inc., Woodland Cree Exploration Inc., 1024044 Alberta Ltd., and Peace River Logging (50%). Also holds investments in Indigenous Bloom Corp., Megalodon Energy Corp., and Bloom Traditional Tobacco. Community Development Trust managed by Peace Hills Trust with market value of $38,842,123.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence about carrying value of investments in First Nation owned companies (Woodland Cree Industries Ltd. financials were not available at audit report date). Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. One subsidiary (Woodland Cree First Nation Community Development Trust) fully consolidated. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $3,360,588 + KTC $15,806,900 + CMHC $4,498,162 + First Nation Development Funds $188,067 + Government of Alberta $310,000 = $24,163,717; osr = $27,857,082 - $24,163,717 = $3,693,365. Chief and council remuneration of $1,766,738 noted in expenses but individual schedule not provided in extracted text.
